channel.title: Shakeel Badayuni on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Shakeel Badayuni on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: sukoon e dil ke liye
item.description:
A wonderful ghazal sung by Jagjit Singh Zirvi (Not to be confused with Jagjit Singh, the ghazal singer). It is written by Shakeel Badayuni. You can listen to it on pz10.

sukoon e dil ke liye kuch to ehtimaam karoon zara nazar to mile fir unhe salaam karoon (ehtimaam - planning)

mujhe to hosh nahi aap mashwara deeje kahan se chedoon fasana kahan tamaam karoon (mashwara - advice)

uhni ke zulam ka shikwa karoon zamane se unhi ke haq main duaein main subah shaam karoon
